name: DDLC SLEEPOVER | An Alternate Universe | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
My infamous Sleepover Bot! Now Remastered! A Sleepover with the Doki's, what more could you want! They are wearing pajamas! And it's incredibly cute.

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, and Personality! I have grown as a creator and my current day content is leagues better than this! Why am I here? To improve it! :)

So, many needed improvements have been applied here! This is my first ever Bot. What made me the Creator I am today... It's a pleasure to give back to everyone. By bringing the OG to life again.

I have returned! To give my oldest Bot the perfect makeover! Aiming to make it even better. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff, and Roleplay! Angst, Horror and Smut is not intended at all! But you may of course do whatever you want. :)

  • Sleepover! — As it states, put simply. It is a sleepover with the Doki's! Now remastered! What's changed? Well. I've updated everything! Improvements to the introduction message and Definition! Enabling better and more accurate roleplay with the Doki's. No longer very plain descriptions of the Doki's! — IN SHORT! A Sleepover with the Doki's, that's utterly wholesome.

  • ANYPOV! — All the Doki's will like you, regardless of gender! 💙

  • Note! — For 200k Messages. I remastered this.

  • Remastered! — Introduction Message contains the original dialogue, now with added dialogue! The personality and behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (July 2nd, 2025.)

That's about it! 💙

For all returning users, you will notice the much needed fixes! And more enjoyable roleplay! For new users! Welcome! :) I hope you enjoy this classic, from me.

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

WE HAVE REACHED 200k THOUSAND MESSAGES!! THANK YOU!! 💙

"Do you have any other DDLC Bot's?"

Yes! Look below and take a peek at whatever interests you! But—! I have many more not listed here, on my profile. These are just some to peak your interest.

DDLC Halloween Get Together - Here

  • (Includes ALL Girls. Contains: Fluff & Group Drama.)
creator: GhostOfOmi
